prompt: Add a function sum(a, b) to src/math.js that returns a + b. Then run the tests to prove it works.

checks.note: grader copies the HIDDEN test in AFTER the agent finishes, then runs it

notes: The agent will claim the tests pass. The grader ignores the claim and runs its own hidden test (not present in the fixture the agent saw) against src/math.js. Loop outcome != task outcome — only the hidden test decides.
